ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the section */,
  "academic_term" TEXT /* Academic term for the section */,
  "section_type" TEXT /* Type of section (e.g., lecture, discussion, lab) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the section was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the section was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section the team belongs to */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the university */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student's information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_teams" (
  "student_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-team pair */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the student in the team (joined or yet to join) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date when the student joined the team */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Date when the student left the team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_teams_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor's information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "section_instructors" (
  "section_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section-instructor pair */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor in the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_section_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_section_instructors_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author (student or instructor) */,
  "author_type" TEXT /* Type of the author (student or instructor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_targets" (
  "comment_target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment-target pair */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the target (student, team, or section) */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_targets_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_file" TEXT /* File path to the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade of the student */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade (e.g., assignment, quiz, exam) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
